S.FORM: Hu Hhichong nilacul u siwkay niza Hu Huichong(1958.5.4), tatayna, mulecuh i Taywan, u wama namakay China. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Sibelle Hu or Hu Huizhong (Chinese: ŤÉ°śÖßšł≠; Wade‚ÄďGiles: Hu Hui-chung; born 4 May 1958) is a Taiwanese actress and singer who starred in both Taiwanese and Hong Kong movies. She acted in many movies in the 1980s and 1990s and retired in the late 1990s. u kawlah niza saka 16 Kin ma kawlah micumud tu sakapahay a tatayna upalaway (Á¨¨16 ) saka 18 Kin ma kawlah micumud tu sakapahay a tatayna upalawayÁ¨¨18 1979 a mihca Yaco iga pasaazih sakapahay a baluhay upalaway u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: ńßu ńßńßi ¶ńßoŇč nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u siwkaj niza ńßu ńßui ¶ńßoŇč(****.*.*), tatajna, mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i tajwan, u wama namakaj ¶ńßina. (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam sib…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ô ńßu or ńßu ńßuizńßoŇč ( ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; wad…ô*gir~…ĺ…ôs: ńßu ńßui- ¶ńßuŇč; born * maj ****) is a taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tr…ôss and siŇč…ôr wńßo starr…ôd in botńß taiwan…ôs…ô and ńßoŇč koŇč mo*i…ôs. sńß…ô a ¶t…ôd in manj mo*i…ôs in tńß…ô ****s and ****s and r…ôtir…ôd in tńß…ô r~…ĺat…ô ****s. u kawr~…ĺańß niza saka ** kin ma kawr~…ĺańß mi ¶umud tu sakapańßaj a tatajna upar~…ĺawaj (*** ) saka ** kin ma kawr~…ĺańß mi ¶umud tu sakapańßaj a tatajna upar~…ĺawaj*** **** a mińß ¶a ja ¶o iga pasaazińß sakapańßaj a bar~…ĺuńßaj upar~…ĺawaj u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
S.FORM: Hu Hhichong nilacul u siwkay niza Hu Huichong(1958.5.4), tatayna, mulecuh i Taywan, u wama namakay China. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Sibelle Hu or Hu Huizhong (Chinese: ŤÉ°śÖßšł≠; Wade‚ÄďGiles: Hu Hui-chung; born 4 May 1958) is a Taiwanese actress and singer who starred in both Taiwanese and Hong Kong movies.
